content.text: Wellington DSSC LDC, MTS, Steno, Etc. Vacancy 2026 : Get complete details about Wellington DSSC LDC, MTS, Steno, Etc. Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Defence Services Staff College (DSSC), Wellington (Nilgiris), Tamil Nadu LDC, MTS, Driver, Steno, Etc. Recruitment 2026 Short Details of Advertisement Notification
For All Candidates : Rs. 100/- Payment Mode : Demand Draft (DD) in favour of DSSC Direct Recruitment 2026, payable at Canara Bank, DSSC Branch (Code 16239)
Tech. Attendant, MTS : 18-25 Years For All Other Posts : 18-27 Years Age Limit as on : 12/06/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Skill Test (If Applicable) Medical Examination Document Verification

Lower Division Clerk : Level 2 (Rs. 19,900-63,200/-) Civilian Motor Driver (Ordinary Grade) : Level 2 (Rs. 19,900-63,200/-) Multi Tasking Staff (Office & Training) : Level 1 (Rs. 18,000-56,900/-) Stenographer Grade II : Level 4 (Rs. 25,500-81,100/-) Supervisor (Networking) : Level 5 (Rs. 29,200-92,300/-) Network Administrator : Level 5 (Rs. 29,200-92,300/-) Hardware Administrator : Level 5 (Rs. 29,200-92,300/-) Lineman : Level 4 (Rs. 25,500-81,100/-) Boat Builder : Level 2 (Rs. 19,900-63,200/-) Technical Attendant : Level 1 (Rs. 18,000-56,900/-)

Lower Division Clerk (LDC) : 12th Passed, Typing (English : 35 wpm/ Hindi : 30 wpm). Civilian Motor Driver (Ordinary Grade) : 12th Passed and HMV Driving License, 02 Years Experience. Multi Tasking Staff (Office and Training) : 10th Class Passed. Technical Attendant (Printing Machine Operator) : ITI in Printing Machine Operator OR 10th Passed with 01 Year Experience. Stenographer : 12th Passed and Stenography [(Dictation (10 Mins : 80 wpm), Transcription (English : 50 Mins, Hindi : 65 Mins)]. Supervisor (Networking) : B.Tech / Master Degree in Computer Application or Computer Science or Information Technology, 02 Years Experience. Network Administrator : 12th Passed with Diploma in Networking OR Bachelor Degree in Computer Application, Certificate in Cisco Certified Network Associate and Cisco Certified Network professional and 02 Years Experience. Hardware Administrator : 12th Passed with Diploma in Computer Hardware OR Bachelor Degree in Computer Application, Certification in Very Large Scale Integration and 02 Years Experience. Lineman : 12th Passed with Diploma in Optical Fiber Cable Line Management and 02 Years Experience. Boat Builder : 12th Passed and 02 Years Experience. Technical Attendant (Printing Machine Operator) : ITI in Printing Machine Operator OR 10th Passed with 01 Year Experience.

items: Payment Mode : Demand Draft (DD) in favour of DSSC Direct Recruitment 2026, payable at Canara Bank, DSSC Branch (Code 16239)
The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.

Network Administrator : 12th Passed with Diploma in Networking OR Bachelor Degree in Computer Application, Certificate in Cisco Certified Network Associate and Cisco Certified Network professional and 02 Years Experience.
Hardware Administrator : 12th Passed with Diploma in Computer Hardware OR Bachelor Degree in Computer Application, Certification in Very Large Scale Integration and 02 Years Experience.
